title: AN ACT CREATING CERTAIN BARRIOS IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF CASIGURAN, PROVINCE OF SORSOGON.

chunks.text:
H. No. 3360 57 OG No. 7, 1199 (February 13, 1961)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 2814, June 19, 1960 ]

AN ACT CREATING CERTAIN BARRIOS IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF CASIGURAN, PROVINCE OF SORSOGON.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Enacted without Executive approval, June 19, 1960.
